findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is violated across 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements Full/Mid/Low energy modes. VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, and Atlas lack mode persistence and UI adaptation.
findings.recommended_fix: Uniformly implement energy-mode context in all products using Supabase sync from MindShift's useEnergyMode hook. Extend data-energy attribute to all templates.

findings.issue: Code-index last built 2026-04-30 — 5 days ago. Stale index risks hallucinated paths and false confidence. Agents are simulating.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and add pre-commit hook to update on every push.

findings.issue: Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance (P0 blocker #15) marked as ready-to-build but no DID or revocation logic exists. Badge tiers shown immediately post-assessment violate CRYSTAL LAW 6 amendment.
findings.recommended_fix: Defer public badge display until VC backend is built. Show only competence feedback post-assessment.

whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: Stale code-index and unenforced Foundation Laws enable systemic drift. Prod integrity compromised.
